title: 10 herbal teas for singers to cure sore throat
description: Ulmus rubra teas have been traditionally used to help soothe a sore throat. The tea is made from the bark of the American Red Elm tree, which contains properties like salicylic acid and other compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. These constituents help reduce swelling and fight off the underlying infection that may be causing the soreness. When you drink Ulmus rubra tea, the salicylic acid and other compounds work together to calm the mucous membranes in you...
